variants: Baptiste Garrel is a resident of Everbrook Hollow, where he continues to innovate in technology. Originally from Fernwillow Estate, he developed a particular interest in science at a young age. One of his most notable creations is the 'Underwood Search Array,' which has earned him recognition in his professional field. His contributions have been acknowledged with the Gemstone Pavilion Distinction, reflecting his influence and dedication. Additionally, Baptiste enjoys being part of the Aurora Marble Collectors, engaging in his passion for marble collecting with fellow enthusiasts.
